mapper.update: UPDATE leave_request SET counselor_id = #{counselorId}, leave_type = #{leaveType}, reason = #{reason}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, status = #{status}, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, approve_reason = #{approveReason}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE leave_id = #{leaveId}
mapper.select: SELECT leave_id, student_id, counselor_id, leave_type, reason, start_time, end_time, status, cancel_reason, approve_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM leave_request WHERE leave_id = #{leaveId}
